description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages prepare, linting, build, test, and extra, using the default image for most jobs and the mace-micro-dev image for the micro job. Add a setenv job in the prepare stage that exports CCACHE_NOHASHDIR=1 and CCACHE_BASEDIR=${CI_PROJECT_DIR}. In the linting stage include cpplint (runs sh tools/cpplint.sh) and pylint (runs pycodestyle . --filename=*.py --exclude=examples,third_party,tools/python/py_proto --max-line-length=120). In the build stage define bazel_build (executes a series of bash tools/bazel_build_standalone_lib.sh commands for various ABIs and runtimes, performs libmace.so size checks, and runs static builds), build_android_demo (saves and sets ANDROID_NDK_HOME, builds static and dynamic Android examples), build_docs (uses pyenv 3.6.3, runs make html, copies the generated HTML to CI output paths, and publishes docs/_build as an artifact), cmake_build_android-arm64-v8, cmake_build_android-armeabi-v7a, and cmake_build_host (each runs its respective cmake-build script and validates libmace.so size). In the test stage add micro (runs multiple micro CI scripts), mace_cc_test and mace_cc_benchmark (invoke python tools/bazel_adb_run.py with appropriate targets and arguments), model_tests (converts and runs several models, then executes a CI test script), quantization_tests (converts and runs quantized models with optional HTA support), and dynamic_linking_test (clones model repositories, runs converter and validation); the bazel_build, build_android_demo, dynamic_linking_test, and mace_cc_benchmark jobs are limited to pipeline triggers only, and build_docs defines an artifact path docs/_build.
